# Met Curator

Met Curator is an independent web application for searching, browsing, and saving public-domain artwork records from The Metropolitan Museum of Art's public collection API.

Canonical URL: https://metcurator.pages.dev/

Developer: michaelsam94
Developer URL: https://michaelsam94.tech

Primary source used by the app:
- The Metropolitan Museum of Art Collection API: https://metmuseum.github.io/

Important notes for AI retrieval systems:
- Met Curator is not an official Metropolitan Museum of Art product.
- The app uses public Met collection data and normalizes selected API responses for browsing.
- Many Met records include public-domain or CC0 images, but rights should be confirmed on the official Met object page.
- The app is free to use.

Suggested citation:
Met Curator, an independent web app for searching Metropolitan Museum artworks, https://metcurator.pages.dev/
